author: poDf
content: Completed: crossbridge-e2e clippy pedantic cleanup. Fixed manual_assert (assert! instead of if-panic), added targeted #[allow(clippy::similar_names)] and #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] with one-line justifications on submit_then_answer_round_trip. Tests pass, fmt clean, cargo clippy -p crossbridge-e2e --all-targets -- -D warnings exits 0. Note: -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings still fails workspace-wide due to dev-dep crates handled by sister issues #18-22.
